title: Lead SEO Specialist at Nike India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Nike India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Nike India Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Coimbatore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Nike India Holdings Services:
Nike India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nike India Holdings Services!
